message:
fix(parser): support one-liner syntax for class, try/except/else/finally, and comprehensions

- Add String token support for single-line class with docstring: class C: """doc"""
- Support function calls in except clauses: except type(exc) as e
- Support subscript targets in comprehensions: [x for tgt[0] in items]
- Simplify try body one-liner detection to accept any non-newline token
- Add one-liner support for else and finally blocks in try statements

These fixes advance Python compatibility by handling common one-liner patterns
found in CPython test suite.
